title: Pale Grass
description: A subtle, muted grass texture with a pale green tone, bringing calm and softness to your overworld.
body:
**Pale Grass**

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b294625e8094af689d4a80c56b5ae0121b1cf851_0.webp)

A reworked grass texture that features a pale green hue, offering a softer and more muted ground cover. This texture brings a calm, subdued atmosphere to the overworld, blending seamlessly with pale and pastel-themed builds.
***

## **Support the work**

If you enjoy what I create, supporting the page helps me spend more time on updates, polishing features, fixing issues, and creating new content for future releases.

Every bit of support helps keep development going — thank you for making the next update possible.
